3031640.name: Escape from the Gacha Corner
3031640.description:
The first basement floor of a supermarket. A lonely space with only capsule toy machines.

... You are trapped there.

Try to escape from this space by making full use of the items from the capsule toy machine.
The capsule toy machine contains more than 40 items in total. Make full use of the items you got to escape!

No Jump Scare
No need to be afraid.
Because there is no one here but you.

Surprising Ending
Why are you here? Escape from this place and you will find the answer.
And you'll meet your loved ones again.

Multiple endings.
There are multiple ways to escape.
Use the items to find your own way out!


Live and streaming
We welcome both live and streaming. Monetization is also acceptable.
